title: Today Is Better Than Two Tomorrows
original_title: Today Is Better Than Two Tomorrow
overview: 'Today is better than two tomorrows' is a meditative observational film following Leh and Bo, two 12 year old Laotian boys who leave their village, undergo a rite of passage and come of age in a remote Buddhist land. It is a tale of innocence and experience. Written by Rodgers, Anna
